project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project.
project_id.title: Project Id

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task within the project.
task_id.title: Task Id

dataset_id.description: The unique identifier of the dataset split.
dataset_id.title: Dataset Id

split_name.description: The name of the split to download (e.g., 'train', 'test', 'validation').
split_name.title: Split Name

format_type.description: The format type for the JSONL output.
format_type.title: Format Type

data_strategy.description: The data strategy for formatting the output.
data_strategy.title: Data Strategy

system_message_generator.description: The system message generator to use.
system_message_generator.title: System Message Generator

custom_system_message.description: Custom system message if not using a generator.
custom_system_message.title: Custom System Message

custom_thinking_instructions.description: Custom thinking instructions for thinking models.
custom_thinking_instructions.title: Custom Thinking Instructions
